svg.title: Global strategy real benchmark FAIL, desktop layout
svg.desc: Direct blue versus Global green cohort totals. simple cohort totals saved 49.874% tokens and 0.744% first-result time; medium cohort totals saved 63.592% tokens and 9.038% first-result time; complex cohort totals saved 91.294% tokens and 9.407% first-result time. All 12 runs passed correctness and evidence gates; the strategy performance gate is FAIL.
svg.metadata: {"all_correct":true,"caveats":{"first_result":"First-result time ends when the completed result is first available.
